SEARCH

Package view

package view
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    BombView
    Class about the view-part of the bombs, to pass the position without the need for the model and the view to communicate
    Explosion
    Class to model the graphic part of the explosions
    GameFrame
    Class to build the frame to draw on the screen
    GamePanel
    Main class for the view, to handle the view of the game and drew the objects on the screen.
    Heart
    Small class just to get the heart image to draw to represent lives
    MonsterView
    Class to manage the position of the monsters for the view package so that the package does not need to communicate with the model
    NewProfileDialog
    Class to create a new profile
    PlayerView
    Class to manage the position of the player for the view package
    PowerUpView
     
    Tile
    Class to represent a single tile of the game map
    TileManager
    Class to manage the loading of the maps used for the levels
    UI
    Class to draw all the user interface screens.
    UtilityTool
    Class with some useful utility tools
